title: tidyprf
text: Read English O tidyprf fornece acesso, partir R, aos conjuntos de dados públicos de segurança viária disponibilizados pela Polícia Rodoviária Federal (PRF). Estão incluídos dados de acidentes por pessoa, acidentes por ocorrência e infrações de trânsito. O pacote permite selecionar o conjunto e o ano desejado, retornando os dados em formato tabular. Os arquivos são distribuídos em formato Parquet por meio GitHub Releases e armazenados em cache local após o primeiro download.

title: tidyprf
text: Mapeie acidentes fatais por estado brasileiro em 2024:
code: library(tidyprf) library(geobr) library(dplyr) library(ggplot2)  fatal <- get_crashes(2024, severity = "fatal") |>   count(uf, name = "acidentes")  read_state(year = 2020, showProgress = FALSE) |>   left_join(fatal, by = c("abbrev_state" = "uf")) |>   ggplot() +   geom_sf(aes(fill = acidentes), color = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +   scale_fill_distiller(palette = "Reds", direction = 1, name = "Acidentes") +   labs(title = "Acidentes fatais por estado (2024)") +   theme_void(base_size = 13) +   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"))

title: tidyprf
text: Instale versão de desenvolvimento GitHub:
code: # install.packages("remotes") remotes::install_github("bonijoao/tidyprf")

title: tidyprf
text: três funções aceitam filtros por: - uf — sigla estado, ex.: "SP", c("SP", "RJ") - br — número da rodovia federal, ex.: 101, 116 - severity — "fatal", "injured" ou "no_victims" (somente acidentes) Use info_accidents(), info_crashes() ou info_violations() para ver descrição de todas variáveis em inglês ou português.

title: tidyprf
text: Os arquivos Parquet são armazenados localmente após o primeiro download:
code: prf_cache()               # exibe arquivos em cache e tamanhos prf_cache_clear()         # apaga todos os arquivos em cache prf_years("accidents")    # anos disponíveis e contagem de linhas por dataset

title: tidyprf
text: MIT

title: Getting started with tidyprf
text: Data stored one Parquet file per dataset per year, hosted GitHub Releases. first time request year, file downloaded cached locally (tools::R_user_dir("tidyprf", "cache")); subsequent calls read cache require internet connection.

title: Getting started with tidyprf
text: chunks section require internet connection, evaluated vignette built. Fetch accident occurrences 2023: can request several years filter state (uf), federal highway (br), — accident data — severity: see years available (large file ) without downloading anything:
code: crashes_2023 <- get_crashes(2023) crashes_2023 # Fatal accidents in São Paulo and Rio de Janeiro, 2020-2023 fatal <- get_crashes(2020:2023, uf = c("SP", "RJ"), severity = "fatal")  # People involved in accidents on the BR-101 people_101 <- get_accidents(2023, br = 101)  # Traffic violations in Minas Gerais violations_mg <- get_violations(2024, uf = "MG") prf_years()

title: Getting started with tidyprf
text: dataset bilingual codebook available offline. runs without internet: Use lang = "pt" descriptions Portuguese: full codebook also available data object:
code: info_crashes() #> # A tibble: 31 × 3 #>    variable       type  description              #>    <chr>          <chr> <chr>                    #>  1 id             int   Accident identifier      #>  2 data_inversa   date  Accident date            #>  3 dia_semana     chr   Day of week              #>  4 horario        chr   Time of accident         #>  5 uf             chr   State (UF)               #>  6 br             int   Federal highway number   #>  7 km             dbl   Highway kilometer marker #>  8 municipio      chr   Municipality             #>  9 causa_acidente chr   Accident cause           #> 10 tipo_acidente  chr   Accident type            #> # ℹ 21 more rows head(info_violations(lang = "pt")) #> # A tibble: 6 × 3 #>   variable                type  description                      #>   <chr>                   <chr> <chr>                            #> 1 numero_auto             chr   Número do auto de infração       #> 2 dat_infracao            date  Data da infração                 #> 3 tip_abordagem           chr   Tipo de abordagem                #> 4 ind_assinou_auto        chr   Indicador de assinatura do auto  #> 5 ind_veiculo_estrangeiro chr   Indicador de veículo estrangeiro #> 6 ind_sentido_trafego     chr   Sentido do tráfego str(codebook) #> tibble [97 × 5] (S3: tbl_df/tbl/data.frame) #>  $ dataset       : chr [1:97] "accidents" "accidents" "accidents" "accidents" ... #>  $ variable      : chr [1:97] "id" "pesid" "data_inversa" "dia_semana" ... #>  $ type          : chr [1:97] "int" "int" "date" "chr" ... #>  $ description_en: chr [1:97] "Record identifier" "Person identifier" "Accident date" "Day of week" ... #>  $ description_pt: chr [1:97] "Identificador do registro" "Identificador da pessoa" "Data do acidente" "Dia da semana" ...

title: Getting started with tidyprf
text: prf_cache() lists files currently cached; prf_cache_clear() removes (, specific dataset/year):
code: prf_cache() #> # A tibble: 0 × 4 #> # ℹ 4 variables: dataset <chr>, year <int>, size_mb <dbl>, cached_at <date> prf_cache_clear("violations", year = 2024) prf_cache_clear()  # everything

title: Getting started with tidyprf
text: Raw data published PRF federal government open data portal. consolidation pipeline (raw CSV Parquet, schema unification across years) maintained bonijoao/tidyprf-dados.

what: Tidy Access to Brazilian Federal Highway Police (PRF) Data
title: Tidy Access to Brazilian Federal Highway Police (PRF) Data
text: Leia em Português tidyprf provides access, R, public road safety datasets made available Polícia Rodoviária Federal (PRF). include data accidents person, accidents occurrence, traffic violations. package allows users select desired dataset year, returning data tabular format. Files distributed Parquet format via GitHub Releases stored local cache first download.

title: Tidy Access to Brazilian Federal Highway Police (PRF) Data
text: Map fatal accidents across Brazilian states 2024:
code: library(tidyprf) library(geobr) library(dplyr) library(ggplot2)  fatal <- get_crashes(2024, severity = "fatal") |>   count(uf, name = "acidentes")  read_state(year = 2020, showProgress = FALSE) |>   left_join(fatal, by = c("abbrev_state" = "uf")) |>   ggplot() +   geom_sf(aes(fill = acidentes), color = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +   scale_fill_distiller(palette = "Reds", direction = 1, name = "Accidents") +   labs(title = "Fatal accidents by state (2024)") +   theme_void(base_size = 13) +   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"))

title: Tidy Access to Brazilian Federal Highway Police (PRF) Data
text: Install development version GitHub:
code: # install.packages("remotes") remotes::install_github("bonijoao/tidyprf")

title: Tidy Access to Brazilian Federal Highway Police (PRF) Data
text: three functions support filtering : uf — state abbreviation(s), e.g. "SP", c("SP", "RJ") br — federal highway number(s), e.g. 101, 116 severity — "fatal", "injured", "no_victims" (accidents ) Use info_accidents(), info_crashes(), info_violations() see variable descriptions English Portuguese.

title: Tidy Access to Brazilian Federal Highway Police (PRF) Data
text: Parquet files cached locally first download:
code: prf_cache()               # show cached files and sizes prf_cache_clear()         # delete all cached files prf_years("accidents")    # available years and row counts per dataset

title: Tidy Access to Brazilian Federal Highway Police (PRF) Data
text: Raw data published PRF Brazilian federal government open data portal. consolidation pipeline converts raw CSV files Parquet files consumed package lives bonijoao/tidyprf-dados.

title: Tidy Access to Brazilian Federal Highway Police (PRF) Data

title: Variable codebook for tidyprf datasets — codebook
text: Compiled official PRF variable dictionaries published https://www.gov.br/prf/pt-br/acesso--informacao/dados-abertos/dados-abertos-da-prf.

what: Get PRF accident data by person — get_accidents

text: Downloads returns accident records person level (one row per person involved accident). Files cached first download.

title: Get PRF infraction data — get_violations
text: Downloads PRF infraction records returns Arrow query. Files 100-300 MB; use dplyr::filter() dplyr::collect() avoid loading full dataset memory.

title: Get PRF infraction data — get_violations
code: get_violations(year, uf = NULL, br = NULL)

title: Get PRF infraction data — get_violations
text: year Integer vector integers. Available: 2019-2020, 2022-2026. uf Character NULL. State infraction (uf_infracao). NULL = . br Integer NULL. Federal highway number (num_br_infracao). NULL = .

title: Get PRF infraction data — get_violations
text: Arrow query. Call dplyr::collect() load tibble.

title: Get PRF infraction data — get_violations
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Filter before collecting to avoid loading 243 MB into RAM get_violations(2024, uf = "SP") |>   dplyr::filter(cod_infracao == "55412") |>   dplyr::collect() } # }

what: tidyprf: Tidy Access to Brazilian Federal Highway Police ('PRF') Data — tidyprf-package
title: tidyprf: Tidy Access to Brazilian Federal Highway Police ('PRF') Data — tidyprf-package
text: Download read Brazilian Federal Highway Police ('Polícia Rodoviária Federal', 'PRF') open data traffic accidents person, occurrence, traffic violations https://www.gov.br/prf/pt-br/acesso--informacao/dados-abertos/dados-abertos-da-prf. Data retrieved demand 'Parquet' files distributed via 'GitHub' releases cached locally reuse.

title: tidyprf: Tidy Access to Brazilian Federal Highway Police ('PRF') Data — tidyprf-package
text: Maintainer: João Paulo Assis Bonifácio jpab.27@hotmail.com (ORCID) Authors: Geraldo Magela da Cruz Pereira (ORCID) Pedro Mambelli Fernandes

title: tidyprf 0.1.1
text: Use absolute GitHub URL Portuguese README link README.md (fixes invalid file URI reported CRAN).

title: tidyprf 0.1.0
text: Initial release. get_accidents(), get_crashes(), get_violations() download PRF open data tidy tibbles, filters year, state (uf), federal highway (br), severity. info_accidents(), info_crashes(), info_violations() provide bilingual variable descriptions (English/Portuguese). prf_years() lists available years per dataset; prf_cache() prf_cache_clear() manage local Parquet cache.
